project_type: Kotlin Multiplatform with Compose Multiplatform - Android + Desktop (JVM/Windows)
build_system: Gradle 8.14 with Kotlin DSL. Uses JetBrains Compose Multiplatform plugin and Kotlin Multiplatform plugin.
test_framework: kotlin.test with JUnit runner for commonTest
verification_instructions: 1. Run ./gradlew build to compile all source sets. 2. Run ./gradlew allTests to run commonTest. 3. Run ./gradlew :composeApp:desktopJar to verify desktop packaging.
setup_instructions: Greenfield project - Gradle wrapper will be generated as part of project setup. Java 25 and Gradle 8.14 are pre-installed.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Java 25 available. Gradle 8.14.5 available. No Android SDK emulator available (no instrumented tests), but Android compilation should work. No physical display for desktop app launch.
contribution_requirements: First commit - no prior conventions. Establish clean KMP patterns.
key_patterns: Source sets: commonMain (shared game logic, UI, canvas), androidMain (Activity, lifecycle), desktopMain (window management). State machine pattern for game states. Compose Canvas for rendering. Scene abstraction for swappable animations.
directory_structure: Root: settings.gradle.kts, build.gradle.kts, gradle.properties. composeApp/ module contains all source sets. composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ has packages: core/ (state machine), engine/ (scene/particle/sprite), ui/ (compose screens), signals/ (AI signal sources). composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/ has Android Activity. composeApp/src/desktopMain/kotlin/ has desktop main entry point.
